name: Generic Impossible Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup unsalted butter, chilled and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add butter pieces to the dry ingredients; use your fingertips to work them in until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Beat eggs in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add sugar to the egg mixture while stirring continuously.
6. Stir in heavy cream and vanilla extract.
7. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir just until combined.
8. Spoon batter into a greased 9-inch pie dish.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until set and lightly browned on top.
10. Allow to cool completely before serving.
